output.level_rationale: Title "Business Operations and Growth Lead" and S&O department context suggest mid-senior IC or lead scope. No years-required, management scope, or reporting-line stated in cached JD snapshot. Estimated L5 based on "Lead" in title and growth/ops responsibility. confidence lowered because full JD details are unavailable.
output.summary: Candidate is a strong core-fit for Strategy & Operations and Business Operations families with eight years' Google S&O experience, two promotions, and transformation/scaling track record. However, the cached JD snapshot is incomplete—only title, department, and location are visible; full responsibilities, stakeholder scope, and growth priorities are missing. Recommend retrieving the complete JD from Airbnb's site to confirm expectations, decision rights, and reporting structure before proceeding. No hard blockers if scope matches L4–L5 expectations.
uncertainties: Cached JD contains only title, department, location, and metadata; full job description text with responsibilities and requirements not provided
Company size/stage at Airbnb for this role context unknown from JD snapshot
Specific growth priorities (supply-side, demand-side, pricing, geo-expansion, etc.) not stated
